summary: Comprehensive testing of Girogirotondo kindergarten app iteration 2 completed with excellent results. Backend API testing achieved 100% success rate (23/23 tests passed). Frontend testing validated all major UI updates including login functionality, role-based dashboards, parent dashboard cards with rich previews, bottom navigation, and responsive design. Application demonstrates outstanding Italian language interface, proper branding, and seamless user experience across all roles.

ui_bugs.issue: Button state does not change to 'Confermata' after clicking
ui_bugs.details: Buttons remain in 'Presa Visione' state instead of changing to 'Presa Visione Confermata' with checkmark

passed_tests: Login page renders with real Girogirotondo school logo image
Login as admin (admin@girogirotondo.it) redirects to /admin dashboard
Login as teacher (giulia@girogirotondo.it) redirects to /teacher dashboard
Login as parent (paolo@famiglia.it) redirects to /parent dashboard
Parent dashboard header shows bell icon with badge '3', centered logo, hamburger menu
Parent dashboard Diario di Bordo card shows text preview of diary entry
Parent dashboard Griglia card shows 4 activity badges (Presente, Bagno, Riposo, Merenda)
Parent dashboard Foto e Video shows horizontal thumbnail gallery strip with 2 images
Parent dashboard Alimentazione card shows meal preview grid (Primo, Secondo, Contorno, Frutta)
Parent bottom navigation has 4 tabs: Home, Documenti, Dieta, Utente
Parent Utente page shows child name (Luca Marino), DOB, child code (GGT-001), parent details
Parent Documenti page shows GDPR disclaimer and 3 documents with Presa Visione buttons
Parent Alimentazione page shows full meal list with categories
Teacher dashboard shows class name 'Farfalle' and lists 3 students (Luca, Sofia, Marco)
Teacher bottom navigation has 4 tabs: Home, Griglia, Media, Profilo
Admin dashboard shows stats cards (6 Utenti, 3 Classi, 5 Alunni, 1 Appuntamenti)
Admin dashboard shows navigation cards (Gestione Utenti, Gestione Classi, Appuntamenti)
Appointment booking FAB opens dialog with date/slot/reason fields
Sidebar menu opens and shows user name, role, navigation items
Omnia GDPR footer visible on all screens
Responsive design works correctly on mobile viewport
Italian language interface throughout application
Brand colors and styling consistent across all pages
All backend APIs working (100% success rate)
Role-based authentication and routing working perfectly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor Presa Visione button state management issue - buttons should change to 'Presa Visione Confermata' with checkmark after clicking. This is a low-priority cosmetic issue that doesn't affect core functionality.
